classesOpen: Nursery, LKG, UKG, Classes I-IX and XI
summary: Parents may submit an enquiry, speak with the admission office, collect the prospectus, and schedule a campus visit.
eligibility: Age criteria and class eligibility are confirmed by the admission office.
Previous school records are required for transfer admissions.
Admission is subject to seat availability and completion of documents.

process.title: Submit Enquiry
process.text: Share parent details, student name, class seeking admission, and contact number.

process.title: Campus Visit
process.text: Visit the school office to understand curriculum, timings, transport, and facilities.

process.title: Interaction and Documents
process.text: Complete the student interaction and submit required documents.

process.title: Admission Confirmation
process.text: Admission is confirmed after verification and school office approval.
